target:
# Test 1: IntegrityCheck (SessionStart)
echo "--- IntegrityCheck ---"
echo '{}' | bun "$HOME/.claude/hooks/IntegrityCheck.hook.ts" 2>&1
echo "EXIT: $?"
echo ""

# Test 2: VaultContext (SessionStart)
echo "--- VaultContext ---"
echo '{}' | bun "$HOME/.claude/hooks/VaultContext.hook.ts" 2>&1
echo "EXIT: $?"
echo ""

# Test 3: SecurityValidator - safe command
echo "--- SecurityValidator (safe) ---"
echo '{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"ls -la"},"session_id":"test"}' | bun "$HOME/.claud
reason: Recursive force delete of system directories
